_publications._publicationTitle: Optical dopamine monitoring with dLight1 reveals mesolimbic phenotypes in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Peak analysis of baseline dLight1.2 recordings revealed that Nf1+/- mice (n = 33) exhibit reduced transient frequency (unpaired t-test; t50 = 3.06, p=0.004)
details: Nf1+/- mice exhibited reduced transient frequency (t50 = 3.06, p=0.004) in baseline dLight1.2 recordings compared to Nf1+/+ littermates
